articles.author: Eliza Peppel
articles.title: These UC Berkeley Students Are Leading the Fight Against Phones - KQED
articles.description: They’re deleting their social media accounts and reducing their screen time. And they want you to join them.
articles.content:
According to a survey of UC Berkeley undergraduates, 78% of students reported that they believe their phone use “prevents them from thinking deeply, being creative, or engaging fully with ideas.”
